zh.lifeSummary: 當Piers de Lutegareshale於1134年出生在英國維爾爾傑爾爾時，他的父親John De Lutegareshale34歲，母親Rohese de Vere24歲。他和Maud de Mandeville至少有1個女兒。他去世於1180年1月14日在英國艾可普萊享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可普萊。

zh-hans.Mildenhall, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Piers de Lutegareshale于1134年出生在英国維爾爾傑爾爾时，他的父亲John De Lutegareshale34岁，母亲Rohese de Vere24岁。他和Maud de Mandeville至少有1个女儿。他去世于1180年1月14日在英国艾可普萊享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可普萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

en.lifeSummary: When Piers de Lutegareshale was born in 1134, in Cherhill, Wiltshire, England, his father, John De Lutegareshale, was 34 and his mother, Rohese de Vere, was 24. He had at least 1 daughter with Maud de Mandeville. He died on 14 January 1180, in Pleshy, Essex, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Pleshey, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Piers de Lutegareshale est né en 1134, à Cherhill, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John De Lutegareshale, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Vere, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Maud de Mandeville. Il est décédé le 14 janvier 1180, à Pleshy, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Pleshey, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Piers de Lutegareshale 1134 in Cherhill, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Lutegareshale 34 und seine Mutter Rohese de Vere 24. Er hatte mit Maud de Mandeville mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. Januar 1180 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Pleshy, Essex, England und wurde in Pleshey, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Piers de Lutegareshale è nato il nel 1134 nel Cherhill, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, John De Lutegareshale, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Rohese de Vere, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Maud de Mandeville. Morì il 14 gennaio 1180, nel Pleshy, Essex, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Pleshey, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Piers de Lutegareshaleが1134年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアチェルヒルで生まれた時，父John De Lutegareshaleは34歳，母Rohese de Vereは24歳であった。彼はMaud de Mandevilleとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1180年1月14日にイギリスエセックスプレシュイで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスプレシーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Piers de Lutegareshale(이)가 1134년 영국 윌츠히르 체힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Lutegareshale(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese de Vere(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Maud de Mandeville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1180년 1월 14일 영국 에세스 플레스히에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 플레셰이에 묻혔다.

mn.Pleshey, Essex, England: Pleshey, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Piers de Lutegareshale nasceu em 1134, em Cherhill, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Lutegareshale, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Vere, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Maud de Mandeville. Ele faleceu em 14 de janeiro de 1180, em Pleshy, Essex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Pleshey, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Piers de Lutegareshale родился в 1134 г. в местности чирилл, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени John De Lutegareshale было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Vere, 24. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Maud de Mandeville. Он умер 14 января 1180 г. в местности плеши, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности плеши, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Piers de Lutegareshale nació en 1134, en Cherhill, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Lutegareshale, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Rohese de Vere, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Maud de Mandeville. Murió el 14 de enero de 1180, en Pleshy, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Pleshey, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
